free_text: Measurement of the Ti-47 (n,p) reaction cross section
Metallic disk sample (2.54 cm in diam., 1.8 mm thick)
Irradiated for 1 and 6 hrs (by 13 uA typically)
- solid angle and other geometric effects,
- neutrons from secondary energy groups and from
- background from empty gas cell and from Ta backings
- fission fragment losses in fission chamber
- contributions due to low-energy neutrons and fission
- activity decay and counting geometry effects
Sample and uranium deposit solid angle
Correlation matrix of the measured ratios
Data received by electronic mail from Mannhart,
On. Received by e-mail from W.Mannhart
